name: Ko Chu Jung
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the rice.
2. Bake the flour in a 325°F oven until lightly browned, stirring often for about half an hour.
3. Combine all ingredients and stir down several times a day until it stops rising.
4. Do not put the mixture into jars until at least one month has passed.
5. Refrigerate or freeze the mixture.
